summary: Comprehensive testing of SellerCloudX AI Marketplace Automation Platform completed. Landing page, login functionality, and most dashboard features work correctly. Main issue identified: AI Dashboard navigation not working properly from partner AI Manager section, which aligns with user's complaint about AI settings buttons not working.

critical_bugs.issue: SQL syntax error: near 'where': syntax error
Validation error - expects number for price but receives string
critical_bugs.impact: Product creation fails with validation error

flaky_endpoints.workaround: Frontend admin login works, backend API session handling issue

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Multiple AI Manager endpoints return 401 errors
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Frontend AI Manager sections load but backend APIs fail

ui_bugs.issue: Dashboard button in partner AI Manager doesn't navigate to AI dashboard page

integration_issues.issue: Partner can access AI Manager section but Dashboard button doesn't redirect to /partner-ai-dashboard

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix AI Dashboard navigation - the Dashboard button in partner AI Manager section must properly redirect to /partner-ai-dashboard or /ai-dashboard. This is the main issue user is complaining about. Also fix backend SQL syntax error in AI toggle functionality and product creation validation.

success_percentage.frontend: 90% (most UI elements work, main issue is AI Dashboard navigation)
success_percentage.overall: 75% (platform mostly functional but AI features need fixes)
